holdings.infoBox: GPIQ is an equity ETF with a total of 107 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.54%, Apple at 6.60%, Micron Technology at 5.73%, Amazon.com at 4.26%, and Microsoft at 4.08%.

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs Nasdaq-100 Premium Income ETF (GPIQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that primarily involves stocks within the Nasdaq-100. Combining equity investments with a call strategy, the fund seeks to generate stable income while offering potential for capital growth GPIQ was launched on Oct 24, 2023 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
